recover.title: Recover Password
recover.subtitle: Enter your email so we can send you the recovery email
recover.success_message: A recovery link has been sent to your email.
recover.error_message: An error occurred while trying to recover your password. Please try again later.

register.title: Create an account
register.name: Name
register.add_schedule: Do you want to add a schedule of availability?

success.title: Success!
success.message: Your account has been created successfully. You can now log in.

error.title: Error
error.message: An error occurred while trying to create your account. Please try again later.

change.title: Change Password
change.subtitle: Please enter and confirm your new password to continue.
change.success_message: Your password has been changed successfully.
change.error_message: An error occurred while trying to change your password. Please try again later.

success.title: Account verified successfully!
success.message: Your account with email {email} has been verified successfully. You can now log in.

error.title: Error verifying account
error.message: An error occurred while trying to verify the account. The verification link may have expired. Please try again or contact support for help.

profile.updateSchedule: Do you want to update your schedule?

text.empty_schedule: No available appointments on this date

appointment.title: Are you sure you want to take an appointment on {month} {day} at {startTime} with {doctorName}?
appointment.subtitle: By doing this you will also be authorizing them to see your medical profile and studies. You can revoke this permission at any time.
appointment.reason_placeholder: Enter a brief reason for the appointment

authorize.title: By doing this, you are authorizing the doctor to view your profile and medical studies. You can revoke this permission at any time.

update.title: Current accesses will be updated.
update.view_habits: With access to habits you grant access to your drinking/smoking habits and diet.
update.view_medical: With medical access you grant access to your medications, conditions and allergies.
update.view_social: With social access you grant access to your hobbies and job.
update.updateable: You can update these permissions at any time.

de_authorize.title: By doing this, you are unauthorizing the doctor from viewing your profile and medical studies. You can authorize them again at any time.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.keep: I wish to keep my taken turns

keep.title: Do you wish to keep your taken turns?

taken.success_message: You have taken an appointment with {doctorName} on {day} of {month} at {startTime}.
taken.error_message: An error occurred while trying to take the appointment. Please try again later.

canceled.success_message: You have canceled your appointment on {day} of {month} at {startTime}.
canceled.error_message: An error occurred while trying to cancel the appointment. Please try again later.

cancel.title: Are you sure you want to cancel the appointment?

delete.title: Are you sure you want to delete this appointment from the list?
delete.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.

fetching.title: Error fetching studies
fetching.message: An error occurred while trying to fetch the patient's studies. Please try again later.

studies.title: Studies
studies.description: Click on a study to manage who can see it

doctors.title: My Doctors
doctors.description: Click on a doctor or go to their profile to manage access to your personal information

table.name: Name
table.empty: You have no doctors authorized to view your profile.

delete.title: Are you sure you want to delete this study?
delete.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.

authorizing.title: Error updating authorizations

deleting.title: Error deleting study
deleting.message: An error occurred while trying to delete the study. Please try again later.

downloading.title: Error downloading files
downloading.message: An error occurred while trying to download the study files. Please try again later.

labels.auth_doctors: Select which doctors will be able to see this study

messages.no_files: Please select at least one file to upload the study.

new_file.data_placeholder: Enter a description with data about the study
